overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a cloaked character walking along a scenic coastal cliffside in a high-fidelity game engine environment. The character traverses from a stone cliff path to grassy inland terrain with mountains in the distance, featuring realistic lighting and atmospheric effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge with mixed grass and stone

events.description: character steps from grass onto stone path along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cliff edge, moving from grassy terrain onto a stone path

entered.detail: calm blue ocean extending to the horizon with sun reflection
steep rocky cliff dropping down to the ocean water
green grassy hillside with small white flowers
flat stone walkway along the cliff edge
hazy mountain range visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a cloaked character walking along a scenic coastal cliff edge. The camera follows from behind as the character moves from grassy terrain onto a flat stone path. To the left, the ocean stretches to the horizon with sunlight reflecting off the water, while steep cliffs drop down to the waves below. Distant mountains are visible through the haze across the bay.

events.description: character moves from stone cliff path onto grassy terrain inland

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass moving away from the cliff edge toward inland hills

entered.detail: large boulder formation visible in the distance on the hillside
small trees and shrubs dotting the grassy landscape

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the stone path onto a wide grassy hillside, moving inland away from the immediate cliff edge. The terrain becomes more open with tall grass and wildflowers surrounding the path. A large rock outcrop becomes visible in the distance ahead, and scattered trees appear on the right side of the frame while the ocean remains visible but more distant to the left.

events.description: character approaches and begins to pass the large rock outcrop

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing a large rock formation while approaching another cliff viewpoint

entered.detail: second cliff edge becoming visible as character approaches the coast again

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the grassy hills approaching a prominent rock outcrop. As the character walks past the large rock formation, the terrain slopes downward revealing another view of the ocean and cliff edge to the left. The distant mountains remain visible in the background throughout the approach, and the grass shows patches of brown and green vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a cloaked character traverses a coastal cliffside that gradually shifts from a narrow stone path to an open, grassy inland hillside. It begins with the character walking along the cliff edge, moving from grass onto a flat stone path while the sun reflects off the ocean and distant mountains shimmer through a haze. As the character leaves the stone path, the scene expands into a wide hillside filled with tall grass and wildflowers, shifting the focus away from the immediate drop of the cliffs toward a distant rock outcrop and scattered trees. The camera then follows the character as they approach and pass this prominent rock formation, where the terrain slopes downward to reveal a final glimpse of the ocean and cliffs to the left against the backdrop of the enduring mountains.
